summary: FASE 1 verification testing completed. Code review confirms all 8 features are implemented correctly in source files. UI testing encountered frontend loading/rendering issues preventing full end-to-end validation. Backend API is healthy and responding correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend takes excessive time to render or Playwright selectors timing out. Login screen is visible but form inputs are not being detected by automated tests within timeout periods (10-15 seconds).
integration_issues.symptoms: Playwright wait_for_selector timeouts on 'input[type="email"]' and navigation elements. Manual inspection shows login form is present in screenshots.
integration_issues.notes: This may be a React hydration delay, async component loading issue, or Playwright selector mismatch. Backend API is healthy (returns 200 OK). Recommend investigating React component mount timing and ensuring data-testid attributes are present on all interactive elements.

passed_tests: Backend API health check - /api/ returns 200 OK with correct message
Frontend loads and displays login screen
Code review: Poin 1 (Product Card) - Single primary button implementation verified in PosProductCard.jsx
Code review: Poin 5 (Price Label) - Dynamic base_unit display verified in PosProductCard.jsx line 43
Code review: Poin 6 (Filter Label) - 'Rentang Harga (Rp)' label verified in FacetRail.jsx line 73
Code review: Poin 7 (Checkout Step 1) - Cart items summary section verified in CheckoutDrawer.jsx lines 228-243
Code review: Poin 11 (Navigation) - resolveActiveNavId() sync verified in App.js line 225
Code review: Poin 15 (ATP Label) - Correct labels verified in FulfillmentInfo.jsx lines 40-44
Code review: Performance fix - selectedCustomerRef implementation verified in useAppActions.js lines 35-36

success_percentage.frontend_code_review: 100% (All 8 FASE 1 features verified in source code)
success_percentage.frontend_ui_testing: 0% (Unable to complete due to selector timeouts)

items.issue: Frontend UI testing blocked by Playwright selector timeouts
items.details: Automated tests cannot detect form inputs and navigation elements within timeout periods. Login screen renders but inputs are not being found by selectors like 'input[type="email"]' or '[data-testid="nav-item-*"]'.
recommended_actions: Verify all interactive elements have data-testid attributes as per FASE 1 requirements
Check React component mount timing - ensure critical elements render synchronously or have loading states
Test login flow manually to confirm it works (backend API is healthy)
Consider adding explicit data-testid to login form inputs if missing
Investigate if there are any console errors preventing React hydration

items.issue: Manual UI verification needed for FASE 1 features
items.details: All 8 FASE 1 features are correctly implemented in code, but need manual UI verification to confirm they work as expected in the browser.
features_to_verify: Navigate through all sidebar menu items and verify active highlight stays in sync
Select customer in POS view and verify NO full page reload occurs
Check product card has single button (not separate Tambah + ⓘ buttons)
Verify price labels show dynamic unit (e.g., '/meter', '/yard')
Verify filter label reads 'Rentang Harga (Rp)' without '/meter' suffix
Add product to cart, open checkout step 2, verify ATP labels show 'Tersedia sekarang' + 'Akan datang' = 'Bisa dijanjikan'
Open checkout step 1 and verify cart items summary is visible
